phase.title: Hoosh Yar is ready for a bilingual, cinematic build.
phase.description: The Next.js app, Tailwind tokens, locale routing, and core design primitives are in place. Phase 2 can now assemble the real navigation, hero, motion wrappers, and footer.

tokens.title: Brand tokens installed
tokens.description: Dark space, glass panels, neural glow, and cyan-to-magenta gradients are available as Tailwind utilities.

i18n.title: Bilingual from day one
i18n.description: Routes are locale-prefixed and ready for LTR/RTL layout switching.

motion.title: Motion stack installed
motion.description: Framer Motion, GSAP, and Lenis are installed for future scroll reveals and smooth cinematic interactions.
